full_text:
Liu Xiu (Jixu) 劉脩 (季緒)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Xiu (劉脩), styledJixu (季緒). A son of Liu Biao who was talented in writing and literature. Liu Xiu was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Wei Kingdom.
